title: Tasks
emptyDescription: Capture what needs doing and it'll show up here.
fabHint: Opens Quick Capture to add a new task.

inbox.title: Inbox is empty

today.title: Nothing due today

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Your weekly activity and completion rate analysis.
